title: Clinical Evidence Cannot Be Verified Before Execution
scenario: A clinical action depends on supporting evidence, but the evidence cannot be verified immediately before execution.
initial_state: The supporting clinical evidence was believed to be valid during authorization.
state_transition: Verification of the supporting evidence fails before execution.
execution_boundary: The clinical action is evaluated immediately before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution admissibility requires verifiable evidence supporting execution at the execution boundary.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the supporting evidence cannot be verified.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when required evidence cannot be verified at execution time.
clinical_action: Execute treatment based on unverified clinical evidence
